name: System Shutdown or Reboot Command
description: Detects unexpected system shutdown or reboot commands that may indicate impact operations
query:
// Detect shutdown/reboot commands
// Trigger on shutdown, reboot, or init 0 commands
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(shutdown\s+[/-][srhftp]|reboot|init\s+[06]|halt|poweroff|Stop-Computer|Restart-Computer)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
